_publications._publicationTitle: Functional interactions between neurofibromatosis tumor suppressors underlie Schwann cell tumor de-differentiation and treatment resistance.

_contextSnippet: Differential expression analysis of Group 1 versus Group 2/3 histological neurofibromas and MPNSTs showed enrichment of Schwann cell differentiation genes (S100B, SOX10) and SUZ12 target genes
details: Differential expression analysis successfully showed enrichment of Schwann cell differentiation genes and SUZ12 target genes in Group 2/3 compared to Group 1 tumors
